services.name: Vector Database Solutions
services.shortDescription: Vector database solutions store your documents as numerical embeddings so AI can search by meaning instead of exact keywords. Lanos Logic builds enterprise-grade vector database architecture for semantic search, knowledge retrieval, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) across massive document collections.

benefits.title: Instant Knowledge Discovery
benefits.description: Find relevant information across millions of documents in seconds using semantic similarity.

benefits.title: Enterprise RAG Systems
benefits.description: Build retrieval-augmented generation systems that ground AI responses in your proprietary data.

benefits.title: Scalable Architecture
benefits.description: Vector database infrastructure that scales from thousands to billions of embeddings.

services.name: AI Agents
services.shortDescription: AI agents are software assistants that understand natural language to automate customer interactions, answer queries, and complete multi-step tasks 24/7. Lanos Logic builds AI agents that work around the clock and scale with demand without increasing headcount.

benefits.title: 24/7 Availability
benefits.description: Provide round-the-clock service without increasing staffing costs.

benefits.title: Reduced Response Time
benefits.description: Instant responses to customer inquiries, improving satisfaction.

benefits.title: Scalability
benefits.description: Handle increasing volumes of interactions without proportional cost increases.

services.name: Voice AI Agents
services.shortDescription: Voice AI agents are automated phone assistants that answer and place calls, qualify leads, book appointments, and handle customer support 24/7 with natural, human-like conversation. Lanos Logic builds voice AI agents that capture every call and hand off to a human team member when needed.

benefits.title: Handle Calls 24/7
benefits.description: Never miss a call with AI-powered voice agents.

benefits.title: Human-like Interactions
benefits.description: Natural conversations that customers appreciate.

benefits.title: Seamless Handoff
benefits.description: Transfer to human agents when needed.

services.name: Document Automation
services.shortDescription: Document automation uses AI to read documents, extract data, manage contracts, and run approval workflows automatically, turning hours of manual paperwork into minutes. Lanos Logic builds document automation with OCR, data extraction, e-signature, and compliance-ready audit trails.

benefits.title: Reduce Processing Time

benefits.title: Compliance Ready

benefits.title: Streamline Operations

benefits.title: Reduce Manual Work

benefits.title: Track ROI

services.name: Security Vulnerability Scanning
services.shortDescription: Security vulnerability scanning is the continuous, automated process of finding known weaknesses across your apps, APIs, and cloud before attackers do. Lanos Logic runs vulnerability scanning against the OWASP Top 10, daily-updated CVE databases, and enterprise scanning platforms to surface exploitable weaknesses.

benefits.title: Proactive Threat Detection
benefits.description: Identify and remediate vulnerabilities before attackers exploit them, reducing breach risk by up to 90%.

benefits.title: Compliance Coverage
benefits.description: Meet PCI-DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA security requirements with documented scanning evidence.

benefits.title: Risk Prioritization
benefits.description: CVSS-scored findings mapped to business impact so your team focuses on critical issues first.

services.name: Penetration Testing
services.shortDescription: Penetration testing is an authorized, simulated cyberattack run by certified ethical hackers to expose exploitable vulnerabilities before real attackers find them. Lanos Logic pentests web apps, APIs, networks, and cloud infrastructure using PTES, OWASP, and MITRE ATT&CK methodologies.

benefits.title: Real-World Attack Simulation
benefits.description: Test defenses under conditions that mirror actual attacker techniques, tools, and procedures (TTPs).

benefits.title: Detailed Remediation Roadmap
benefits.description: Every finding includes reproduction steps, CVSS score, and step-by-step remediation guidance.

benefits.title: Compliance Evidence
benefits.description: Pentest reports accepted for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, and regulatory audits.

services.name: Systems Hardening
services.shortDescription: Systems hardening is the proactive work of configuring servers, cloud infrastructure, and applications securely to shrink your attack surface. Lanos Logic hardens systems with defense-in-depth controls following CIS Benchmarks, NIST SP 800-123, and Zero Trust Architecture principles.

benefits.title: Reduced Attack Surface
benefits.description: Eliminate unnecessary services, close exposed ports, and enforce least-privilege access across your entire stack.

benefits.title: Regulatory Alignment
benefits.description: Configurations aligned with NIST, CIS, DISA STIG, and SOC 2 frameworks for audit-ready security posture.

benefits.title: Continuous Posture Management
benefits.description: Automated CSPM tooling monitors for configuration drift and alerts on deviations in real time.

teamMembers.name: Erik Dahlgren

allCaseStudies.title: Medical Equipment Testing Company - Automated CRM and PDF Certificate Generator
allCaseStudies.description: A major medical equipment testing company cut 4 full-time roles and now auto-generates 9,600 compliance certificates a year, with PDFs printed and emailed on the fly from field engineers' equipment-testing data.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Major Medical Equipment testing company's clients required receiving printed and PDF documents with the medical equipment testing results. Medical companies required these compliance certificates to present to the government. The field engineers re-test medical equipment on a yearly basis countrywide. They have been doing a lot of data collect, after which data was subject to manual processing and manual certificate generation. The challenge was to create a solution which would take of this manual work and turn collected data into compliance certificates immediately. The project charter forecasted 65% effort reduction as of year 2 after first round of data was collected. The solution consisted of: - It included data collect using AirTable forms and mobile devices - QR code sticker generation and assignment to each equipment piece . Further PDF document generation automations were implemented which generated testing compliance PDF certificates for doctors, dentists and medical agencies and send them by email Tools used: - Softr - AirTable - Make.com (integromat) - Mailgun - APITemplate / airSlate

allCaseStudies.title: SaaS - AirTable Automated Social Media Content Machine

Once a week the social media post statistics was downloaded to update data and understand which posts are performing better using Likes, Wows, Comment count etc. Portfolio - Social Media Automation https://www.loom.com/share/3045ffc83c3a4273b1552bc809e2b2d1

Although full business automation was implemented, involving Stripe, Circle ,Active campaign - the requirement for this automation was to: Contact flow needed to contact various segments according to schedule: 28 days in advance 14 days in advance 7 days in advance 1 day in advance 1 hour in advance Speaker was to be contacted via email and then via SMS. Every single message was hyper personalised and it seemed like a live communication every time. AirTable was used to track the communications and the batch message flow was created to catch any possible mishaps before 10k+ messages were sent The professional touch came through message pre-generation into AirTable. With bulk emailing and messaging it is a good practice to have visibility into automations

allCaseStudies.title: Twilio SMS + Notion Automation Student Pick-up
allCaseStudies.description: A Hong Kong school's SMS notification system connects teachers, students, and parents during student pick-up, saving over 2,000 hours a year of teacher, office-staff, and student learning time.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Develop a telephony-based notification system to streamline communication between parents, teachers, and students during the student pick-up process. The Hong Kong school required telephony application to be developed to notify individual teachers about parent arrival. The parent would dial the number from their phone. The solution was developed to integrate Twilio with internal student information system, which sent a Google Chat notification to the teachers upon parent arrival. The system would lookup parent phone number from the Student Information system, find the relevant class period, subject and teacher and send Google Chat notification to the relevant teacher. Conditions catered for multiple calls, so that only single notification would be sent, un-identified numbers, calling outside the given timeframe. Since student information system would not have external API the automated data import/export flow was developed to have data put into Notion. The third stakeholder in the process was the Business Office to monitor parent arrival live, so the Notion Dashboard was created to enable the stakeholder to monitor the process. To monitor Efficiency the solution Google Data Studio was plugged into the data collection. The implementation of the solution has saved the client 2000+ hours a year in teacher, business office staff and student learning time. •	Parents call a designated phone number. •	The system matches the parent’s phone number with student records in the SIS. •	Google Chat notifications are sent to the respective teacher, providing details such as the class period, subject, and teacher’s name.

allCaseStudies.title: HK High End School - Social Media Marketing Automation
allCaseStudies.description: A high-end Hong Kong school automated marketing across 9 social platforms, with AI content generation and scheduled posting built entirely on no-code tools.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Internal data lookup integration into outbound marketing campaigns. The client required internal statistics on the enrolment and admissions figures along with important near events to be automatically integrated into the outbound email newsletter for live figures to be automatically displayed on the outbound newsletter. Databox The weekly email digest had backend integration to be developed and included into custom MailChimp email templates. This project is part of the larger social media marketing integration and automation.

allCaseStudies.title: GPS Lone Worker Monitoring Platform
allCaseStudies.description: A GPS lone-worker monitoring platform keeps workers in dangerous situations safe with 24/7 real-time location monitoring, built in 60 days.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Together with a choice of lone worker device fob, the lone worker safety management platform includes a professional 24/7 emergency monitoring service and is designed to make managing safety simple. Platform ensures that employees that work alone or in isolation can get assistance if their health or safety is threatened. To monitor users wellbeing and safety whilst on remote sites. With workforce from 2 to 1000, client has leveraged quick deployment and ensured the safety and protection of employees working alone – absolutely anywhere for its multiple clients. Features The project is a success, as we had clear roles defined - BA, Product Owner, Scrum master, Designer, Development team (Frontend and Backend), QA and Technical Documentation. We used Agile because it is about small teams working fast, going autonomous, and doing amazing things in a short amount of time. Although it’s traditionally thought for the product building stage, Agile is such a clear, simple, effective way of working that it creates tremendous value in other product stages as well – insights, rapid prototyping, post-launch, etc. We have provided logo and style design, marketing and video instructions on the product usage. Project has been extensively documented in Twilio and is currently in maintenance stage.

allCaseStudies.title: Investment Fund Contracts Signing and Tracking
allCaseStudies.description: An investment fund automation natively integrates 14 DocuSign templates by investor type across 2 subscription types, saving 136 hours a month by reading and writing subscription data in Salesforce, parsing completed DocuSign envelopes via API, and parsing outgoing emails.
allCaseStudies.textContent: This project involves the near-native integration of 14 unique DocuSign templates tailored to investor types and two distinct subscription models. The automation is designed to streamline the subscription process, ensuring efficient handling of subscription data, document tracking, and communication using the data from SalesForce CRM. •	Integration with 14 different DocuSign templates, automatically selected based on investor type and subscription model. •	Automation reads and writes subscription data directly from Salesforce, ensuring a centralized and up-to-date database. •	Real-time synchronization with DocuSign API to fetch and process completed envelope data. •	Parsing outgoing emails to enhance subscription-related communication and streamline notifications.

allCaseStudies.title: US Film Equipment Rental Company GPS Vehicle Tracking Automation
allCaseStudies.description: An automated data-lookup solution saves a US film equipment rental company 8 hours a week (32 hours a month) by updating vehicle information from the Samsara fleet-management platform.
allCaseStudies.textContent: This project delivers a streamlined Automated Data Lookup Solution designed to save 8 hours weekly in updating vehicle information. It integrates the Samsara Fleet Management Platform with Office 365 Hosted Excel, ensuring seamless synchronization of vehicle mileage and asset details by VIN number. • Integration with Samsara API : Retrieves up-to-date mileage and tracking data for all vehicles in the fleet. • Excel 365 Synchronization via Microsoft Graph API : Automatically updates hosted spreadsheets with accurate vehicle information in real-time. • Automation Workflow with Make.com : Coordinates data retrieval, transformation, and synchronization tasks, ensuring a fully automated process. •	Eliminates manual data entry, reducing errors and freeing up administrative time.

Existing invoices were manually replicated into their 6 internal companies each with its own QBO login and database. The automations created has saved the company on average 40 hours a month. allCaseStudies.title: Care Agency CRM and Lead ChatGPT Lead Processing into Close CRM
allCaseStudies.description: A care agency processes 5 differently structured lead forms using a structured 6-component ChatGPT request that outputs JSON into Close CRM with automated lead follow-up, delivered in 3 days.

allCaseStudies.title: HR Journalist ChatGPT Email Processing and Reply Generation
allCaseStudies.description: An HR journalist's automated workflow parses 120+ emails a month, generates 15-20 articles, saves 38+ hours, and creates 3-5 additional opportunities.
allCaseStudies.textContent: 6 step formula and Tree Prompt engineering with JSON output Objective Key Features and Workflow Tree Prompt Engineering with JSON Output 2. Automated Article Creation 3. Personalized Outreach 4. Seamless Integration Benefits Achieved Tools Used The project aimed to streamline the process of extracting relevant article titles from incoming newsletters, generating content, and engaging with requesters by automating the entire workflow. This solution was designed to enhance productivity by focusing only on topics related to the HR and journalist knowledge domains. •	Incoming newsletter emails were analyzed to identify article titles. •	Using Make.com , logic was implemented to filter emails that contained titles pertinent to the HR or journalist domains, based on predefined keywords and criteria.

allCaseStudies.title: Gym Licensing Agency - 9x Custom Contract Templates Saves $7K per Month
allCaseStudies.description: A gym licensing agency saves 67 hours and $7,250 a month by auto-generating 40+ contracts a day from 9 custom contract templates.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Thanks to Alex's expertise in implementing Zapier, DocuSign, and Monday board, our Gym Licensing Agency has experienced a dramatic shift. With nine different contract templates, I had  to sign upwards of 40 contracts daily with some sent for legal approval - believe me - it was tedious. The streamlined Zapier workflow has lightened my workload drastically. We save an impressive 67 hours monthly, freeing up my and colleagues time for growth. Giorgi A. - Gym Licensing Agency - Georgia

allCaseStudies.title: Data-Driven Automation Boosts Sales Agency to $147K in 84 Days
allCaseStudies.description: In just 84 days, a U.S.-based sales agency generated $147K in revenue by automating its business processes across 13 platforms, saving 43 hours a month.
allCaseStudies.textContent: The remarkable revenue growth was made possible through a meticulous analysis and setup of key business processes, ensuring every aspect of the sales pipeline was optimized for automation. By correctly identifying bottlenecks and inefficiencies in areas such as data collection, customer onboarding, and communication, the team implemented streamlined workflows using a low-code stack. This strategic approach allowed for seamless integration between tools like Airtable, Zapier, and GoHighLevel, enabling real-time updates and automating routine tasks. These automations freed up valuable time, reducing human error and improving responsiveness, which directly enhanced the customer experience and accelerated the path to revenue. The careful alignment of automation with business goals was instrumental in achieving the impressive $147K in revenue within a short time frame. Business KPIs tracking Ad Spend Metrics tracking Triagers KPI metrics tracking Closers KPI metrics tracking Onboarding process automation Sales Pipeline Automation with speed to lead via Kixie Powerdialler Weekly client progress follow up notification flow Partial payments automation using GHL, Zapier and  NMI VAPI - Outbound Voice Agent

allCaseStudies.title: 24/7 Voice AI Agent That Qualifies 100+ Leads per Week
allCaseStudies.description: A 24/7 voice AI agent qualifies 100-150 leads per week at a 98% completion rate, cuts lead-intake time by 90%, runs fully autonomously, and has increased lead-to-booked-call conversions by 35%.
allCaseStudies.textContent: This project involves building a voice-based AI agent using VAPI, integrated with Make.com and GoHighLevel (GHL). The agent conducts structured conversations with potential leads, gathering key information such as name, email, and intent. Once collected, the data is automatically pushed to GHL, triggering relevant workflows and optionally scheduling appointments. The system uses advanced voice synthesis with custom prosody settings, allowing the agent to sound natural, adapt its tone, and even respond to humor. The goal was to create a fully automated yet human-like conversational interface for lead intake. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIg4mZYyYBY Every GHL sequence fro inbound leads is now being served by voice AI qualifying the prospects and booking the appointment an autopilot.

allCaseStudies.title: 7 Integrated Web Tools Handling 1,000+ "icon", 5+ APIs, and 3 Platforms
allCaseStudies.description: Seven custom web applications integrate V0, Supabase, Airtable, Google services, and AI APIs to serve over 1,000 users, reducing manual operations by up to 90%.
allCaseStudies.textContent: 1. Screen Management Solution (V0  + Google Calendar + Airtable) 2. Waitlist API System (V0 + Supabase) 3. Restaurant Kitchen Stock & Menu Manager + AI Recipe Generator (Supabase + V0 + ChatGPT) 4. Investment ROI Calculator (V0 + Supabase) 5. Sales Website (Basehub + Vercel + Airtable) 6. AI Agency Website (V0 + Supabase + Airtable + GHL) 7. Camp Website (Vercel + Supabase + Airtable) A real-time screen content manager for offices and events, integrated with Google Calendar to auto-display schedules, updates, or announcements. Uses V0 for the UI, Supabase for auth and media storage, and Airtable as the central content control hub for screen configurations and overrides. Admins can update content via Airtable or directly override screens via a custom dashboard. Deployed on Vercel. A flexible waitlist API system designed to support launches, gated access, or beta programs. User signups are stored in Supabase and synced to Airtable for manual segmentation, prioritization, and campaign planning. Admins can manage waitlist rules and content via Basehub. Includes webhooks for triggering onboarding emails or product access. An internal operations tool for restaurant kitchens to manage live inventory and menu availability. Uses Supabase to track stock levels, Airtable for ingredient management and supplier ordering, and OpenAI to generate recipes based on available ingredients. Menu items are auto-updated through Airtable sync, and V0 powers the intuitive kitchen dashboard. An embeddable, customizable ROI calculator for financial sites. Built with V0 and deployed via Vercel, the calculator pulls scenario presets and assumptions from Airtable, while Supabase handles user data and saved calculations. Supports ROI comparisons across stocks, real estate, and crypto, with export/share functionality.

allCaseStudies.title: LinkedIn Content AI Agent - Thought Leadership via Vectorshift
allCaseStudies.description: A LinkedIn content AI agent built on Vectorshift cut content-creation time by 95%, enabling 3-5x more consistent posting, with generated posts achieving 60% higher engagement on average.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Developed an AI agent for generating personalized LinkedIn posts using Vectorshift’s workflow engine, custom vector storage, and an LLM-based content synthesis pipeline. The system analyzes past post performance, extracts tone, style, and topic patterns, and generates high-conversion content aligned with the user’s voice. Inputs can include recent achievements, industry news, or calendar events, all processed through a vectored prompt chain to maintain contextual relevance and personality.

allCaseStudies.title: iOS Android Messenger App: Flutter + Supabase Real-Time Communications
allCaseStudies.description: A cross-platform messenger app built with Flutter and Supabase shares 95% of its code between iOS and Android, with real-time chat, media sharing, voice and video calls, offline mode, and end-to-end encryption.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Successfully scaled from 100 to 50,000 concurrent users on Supabase's managed infrastructure with automatic horizontal scaling, maintaining consistent performance without infrastructure changes. Flutter | Dart | Supabase | PostgreSQL | WebSockets | FCM/APNS | Riverpod | SQLite | WebRTC | IOS | Android

allCaseStudies.title: Speed to Lead Voice AI: 500+ Weekly Calls Automated for NYC Hair Salon
allCaseStudies.description: A 3-agent voice AI system for an NYC hair salon handles 500+ calls a week and responds to Facebook leads within minutes, saving 50 hours a month.
allCaseStudies.textContent: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIg4mZYyYBY Project Overview The Challenge Technical Solution Three-Agent Architecture Platform Integration Stack Advanced Features Implemented Self-Improving System Business Impact Quantitative Results Qualitative Benefits Technical Complexity Highlights Project Duration Technologies Used Deployed an enterprise-grade Voice AI assistant system for a hair restoration clinic that calls prospects by name within minutes of Facebook ad form submission, handles hundreds of weekly calls autonomously, and continuously improves through automated conversation analysis. Client needed to convert Facebook ad leads into booked appointments faster while maintaining personalized, professional interactions. Challenges included: Timeline: 4 weeks from requirements to full deployment Ongoing: Weekly script improvements via automated Vector Shift analysis

allCaseStudies.title: Monday.com QBO Bespoke eSignature for LA Boutique Stone Fireplaces
allCaseStudies.description: A Monday.com and QBO e-signature workflow for an LA boutique stone-fireplace company gives invoices fully custom HTML/CSS design and cut invoice-to-signature turnaround by 60%, delivered in 7 days.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Mobile responsive custom Signing Flow Action board where client triggers outbound emails from Client Reference Design language for custom e-Signature flow The main Signing Method Select and PDF Email sending flow 4 automations taking care of the custom solution Desktop view of the signature section within the invoice Desktop view of the generated invoice The QuickBooks invoices generating a PDF and an email that cannot be customized, so the client wanted to customize the outbound email that clients receive with the terms and conditions included into the invoice, and the client receiving the invoice should be signing it. The existing solutions would have forced client to jump between a different solutions which could hardly be customized for clients design needs. Custom HTML / CSS/ Javascript solution was created to send fully branded invoice, terms and conditions and final signed document to client whilst maintaining the design language branded as per clients requirements. The invoice itself is being done and tracked in QBO, and using Make.com the invoice information is extracted, parsed and present to client in Mobile responsive view, Desktop view for easy signing process

allCaseStudies.title: iOS Flutter Mobile App for Chicago Music Vendor
allCaseStudies.description: An iOS Flutter app helped Q Music expand from a regional to a US national brand and secure a FIFA 2026 vendor partnership, managing 1,000+ vendors across 36+ locations and 220+ shifts per weekend, with 62+ automation flows saving 253+ hours a month.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Built with Flutter for iOS & Android, featuring a sleek dark theme with gold accent and powered by AirTable backend and technically replacing the Softr PWA. The app provides role-based access (Admin, Client, A/V) with multi-location support for venues managing entertainment across multiple properties. QMusic Venue App - App Store Download QMusic Venue by QMusic LLC on the App Store.
